sources.claim: Code review should assess design, functionality, complexity, tests, naming, comments, style, documentation, every line, and broader context.
Secure development practices should reduce vulnerabilities, mitigate exploitation impact, and address root causes to prevent recurrence.
Cyclomatic complexity quantifies independent execution paths; high complexity increases test/maintenance burden and defect risk.
Semantic conventions provide common operation/data names for traces, metrics, logs, profiles, and resources, with reserved error/exception attributes.
